description: Geṭ (bill of divorce). On parchment. Location: al-Maḥalla ha-Gedola (al-Kubrā). Dated: Monday, 16 Tammuz 1458 Seleucid = 16 June 1147 CE. Husband: Abū l-Fakhr b. Ḥalfon ha-Kohen. Wife: Sāmī bt. Shela. Written and signed by Zakkay b. Moshe, also signed by ʿAmram b. Yaʿaqov. Verso is blank. (Information from Goitein's note card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
